heading: United States-Mexico joint agricultural research
label: 3292a United States-Mexico joint agricultural research

children.heading: Research and development program
children.label: a Research and development program
children.text: The Secretary may provide for an agricultural research and development program with the George E. Brown United States/Mexico Foundation for Science. The program shall focus on binational problems facing agricultural producers and consumers in the 2 countries, in particular pressing problems in the areas of food safety, plant and animal pest control, and the natural resources base on which agriculture depends.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: b Administration
children.text: Grants under the research and development program shall be awarded competitively through the Foundation.

children.heading: Matching requirements
children.label: c Matching requirements
children.text: The provision of funds to the Foundation by the United States Government shall be subject to the condition that the Government of Mexico match, on at least a dollar-for-dollar basis, any funds provided by the United States Government.

children.heading: Limitation on use of funds
children.label: d Limitation on use of funds
children.text: Funds provided under this section may not be used for the planning, repair, rehabilitation, acquisition, or construction of a building or facility.
